collections.note: Cash-basis revenue from P&L is the closest proxy for client cash collections YTD. The Collections report only shows invoices with open balance.

wip.note: Unbilled work-in-progress, May 1 through June 8, 2026 — most recent 6/8 WIP export. Prior window (5/1–6/30 per 6/1 export) was $2,704,695.19 / 5,753.70 hrs.

originatingAttorneys.note: Source: 6/15 matter-level A/R aging (Clio). Book total differs from the A/R Aging Summary (which ties to the balance sheet) by ~$182,437.80 — a Clio-vs-QuickBooks reconciliation gap, not an error.

distributions.note: Partner draws & guaranteed payments (GL 6051/6053) YTD through 6/8, cash basis. NYS PTET tax adjustments are folded into each partner's net figure rather than shown as separate line items. Restricted to GL 6051 (Guaranteed Payments) and 6053 (Partner Distributions); Bad Debt Expense and Reconciliation Discrepancies entries are excluded, and 401(k)-contribution lines are merged into their partner.

drawsByDate.note: Dated transactions exist only for the window the P&L Detail report was run for. Upload a P&L Detail report run for Jan 1 to today to backfill the whole year.

monthlySnapshot.note: Period P&L is the 5/1–6/8 accrual summary (the only standalone P&L summary in the 6/8 batch). Cash flow shown is YTD (1/1–6/8). Cash-basis YTD: revenue $15,992,672.33, net $-990551.14. Accrual-basis YTD net $-2836794.4.

preDrawWeekly.note: Weekly pre-draw income (operating profit before partner draws). Each week is the firm's collected fee value that week, scaled so the year sums to the actual YTD pre-draw income; Monday-anchored weeks.
